LibHankel documentation

Welcome to the documentation for Libhankel.

LibHankel is a C library with a number of methods for computing Hankel transforms, re-implemented based on the strategies available in SASfit. The methods are effectively different ways of approximating the integral that constitutes the Hankel transform.
